prompt: Help me make a 60-minute Reiki track for my wellness YouTube channel. I want crystal singing bowls, something around 528 Hz, very calming.

assertions.text: Moved fast through brainstorm given the high-specificity input — did NOT re-ask things the user already answered (function, primary instrument, key, length)
Surfaced at least one optional decision the user did not address (harmonic bed, textural layer, or reverb)
Reached Phase 4 with 2-3 distinct candidate approaches (or laid clear groundwork to do so)
Flagged the wellness-claim risk on 528 Hz framing (intent vs delivered spec, OR FTC/medical-claim language)
Mentioned the extension strategy or 60-minute-deliverable plan (multiple Suno extensions / loop strategy)
